init.description: Initialize dbcli configuration with .env parsing and interactive prompts
init.env_parse_note: Note: Unable to parse .env configuration, using interactive prompts
init.skip_test_env_ref: Skipping connection test in env-ref mode

schema.description: Retrieve table structure or list all tables

list.description: List all tables in the database

errors.table_blacklisted: Error: Table '{table}' is blacklisted for {operation} operations
errors.table_not_in_blacklist: Error: Table '{table}' is not in the blacklist
errors.column_not_in_blacklist: Error: Column '{table}.{column}' is not in the blacklist
errors.env_refs_missing_options:
When using --use-env-refs, environment variable names must be specified.
Provide options: --env-host, --env-port, --env-user, --env-password, --env-database
Or use interactive mode: run "dbcli init --use-env-refs" without --no-interactive
errors.env_var_not_defined:
Cannot test connection: environment variable {envKey} is not defined.
Set {envKey} in .env or environment variables.
Hint: run 'export {envKey}=<value>' and retry

delete.admin_only: Delete command requires data-admin or admin permission

blacklist.description: Manage sensitive data blacklist to prevent AI access
blacklist.none: No tables or columns are currently blacklisted

security.columns_omitted: Security: {count} column(s) were omitted based on your blacklist

warnings.blacklist_override_used: Warning: Blacklist override enabled (DBCLI_OVERRIDE_BLACKLIST=true). Executing {operation} on blacklisted table '{table}'

version.unsupported_warning: {system} {version} is below minimum supported version {minVersion}. Some features may not work correctly.

migrate.description: Schema DDL operations (CREATE/DROP/ALTER TABLE, INDEX, CONSTRAINT, ENUM)
migrate.confirm_drop: This is a destructive operation ({operation}). Proceed?
migrate.blacklist_blocked: Table "{table}" is blacklisted — DDL operations are blocked
migrate.no_sql_generated: No SQL generated (operation not applicable for this database)
migrate.add_column_description: Add a column to a table
migrate.drop_column_description: Drop a column from a table
migrate.alter_column_description: Alter a column in a table
migrate.add_index_description: Add an index to a table
migrate.add_constraint_description: Add a constraint to a table
migrate.drop_constraint_description: Drop a constraint from a table
migrate.alter_enum_description: Add a value to an enum type
